0.text: Slightly irregularly circumscribed nodule measuring 8 mm in diameter in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

1.text: Minimal volume loss around the nodule in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

2.text: Linear density increases around the nodule in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

3.text: Additional nodules in the right lung, the largest measuring approximately 5.3 mm in diameter in the lower lobe of the right lung

4.text: Nodules in both lungs, more prominent on the right
